text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, my dear trainer! The vaunted day<n>is upon us!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby, which some<n>refer to as the
Tokyo Yushun...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Has sold out! It will be a live<n>orchestra, and the
lineup is replete<n>with this year's brightest stars!

However, their only purpose is to<n>make me shine
all the more brighter!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, this young Overlord's reign<n>shall last
forever!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just coming to the Derby has already<n>gotten her
amped up. We head for the<n>paddock side by side.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ayabe. I see you've positioned<n>yourself on
the board well to make it<n>here.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What say you? For this momentous<n>occasion, will
you not join me in a<n>song before the race?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...No. I'm not going along with your<n>shtick. But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't pin the blame on you<n>anymore either.
Blame? Whatever do you mean?

The Satsuki Sho, I... I couldn't bear<n>responsibility
for myself.

So I played the victim. That's why I<n>couldn't finish
strong.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But today... I'm focusing inward.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm here... because I want to run. I'll<n>win this
Derby through my own will.
Interesting... So that is yourmindset.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are indeed the Umamusume I<n>thought you
were. I'm sure you<n>agree, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
More deflection and laughter... I don't<n>think she
understands Admire<n>Vega's feelings all that well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I'm glad to see the fire in<n>your eyes!
You are a worthy rival,<n>Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Show me what you can do! Are you<n>simply a
supporting role or...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you the comrade who joins me in<n>the battle
against the older<n>generation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The plot for today's act is yet to be<n>written! Its
fate lies within our strides.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, to victory!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe's changed. She hated talking<n>to Opera O
when they first met, but<n>now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She stood up for herself—with<n>determination too.
Wow... It's going to<n>be a good race.
